name: National Emergency Number
description: All-in-one emergency number for police, fire, and medical emergencies across India. Free from all mobile and landline networks.

name: Ambulance Services
description: Free emergency ambulance service available across India, including Kerala.

name: Fire and Rescue Services
description: Kerala Fire and Rescue Services emergency line.

name: Kerala State Emergency Operations Centre (KSEOC)
description: State-level 24x7 emergency operations centre under KSDMA, coordinating disaster response across all Kerala districts.

name: Kerala State Disaster Management Authority (KSDMA)
description: State disaster management authority headquarters, Thiruvananthapuram.

name: District Disaster Management Control Room, Wayanad
description: Statewide toll-free district disaster management control room number, routed to the Wayanad Collectorate during active incidents.
dataSource: District Collectorate directory pattern (e.g. Kottayam DDMC)

name: Kerala Health Department Emergency Helpline (Wayanad Landslide Response)
description: Dedicated helpline numbers issued by the Kerala Health Department for emergency medical assistance during Wayanad landslide response operations.

name: Highway Emergency Assistance
description: Assistance for accidents or vehicle breakdowns on national highways.

name: Women's Helpline
description: Confidential 24x7 helpline for women facing abuse, violence, or safety concerns, including during disaster displacement.

name: Child Helpline
description: Confidential 24x7 helpline for children in distress or separated from guardians, including during evacuation and shelter operations.

name: Director General, Fire and Rescue Services / Civil Defence, Kerala
description: State headquarters for Fire and Rescue Services and Civil Defence and Home Guards, overseeing volunteer civil defence deployment during disasters.
dataSource: Kerala Fire and Rescue Services / Civil Defence

name: Kerala State Electricity Board (KSEB) - Power Outage Helpline
description: 24x7 toll-free helpline for reporting power outages, downed lines, transformer faults, and electrical hazards during disaster conditions.

name: Kerala Water Authority (KWA) - Drinking Water Helpline
description: 24x7 toll-free helpline for drinking water supply disruptions, contamination reports, and sewerage issues during disaster conditions.

name: Kerala Medical Helpline
description: State medical helpline for health-related emergencies and guidance, in addition to the 108 ambulance service.
dataSource: Kerala State Disaster Management Authority (KSDMA) Emergency Directory, June 2026

name: Highway Police Alert (Kerala)
description: Kerala Highway Police alert line for road accidents, breakdowns, and blocked-route reporting, complementing the national 1033 helpline.
dataSource: Kerala State Disaster Management Authority (KSDMA) Emergency Directory, June 2026
